dr_chen: The perimeter runs sixteen cameras. Every twelve seconds the blind spot opens for four.
We go in pairs. Maya, you're with me. Jerome, take the north wall.
The rest of you — the east wing is your route.
The mainframe is three levels down. I'll meet you there.
If I'm not there in twenty minutes, assume I failed.

player: This opens without tripping the sensors?
note: — The lock opens without sound. The patrol route shifts slightly west.

maya: They don't leave gaps in their rotations.

note: — A door opens at the far end of the corridor.

approach.speaker: LILA
lines: Stop. Before you go further.
I know who you are. I know what you're here to do.
I was the one who left the terminal unlocked in Vault 49.
My name is Lila Chen. I'm his daughter.
And I need you to make a choice.

choices.label: "We cure them. Every one we can."
"We do what we have to. Some of them can't be saved."
"We tried to stay out of it. We didn't always succeed."

cured_response.speaker: LILA
lines: Then you understand.
You understand that the conversion isn't the person. It's a cage.
My father built the cage. He's been trying to take it apart ever since.
He needs to get to the core. Don't let him waste time with heroics.
He's sixty-one years old. He needs to be the one who closes the door.

fought_response.speaker: LILA
lines: I know.
I know it doesn't always go the way you want it to.
I'm not judging you.
But inside that building there are three hundred converted staff members.
Think about what you're going to do when you meet them.
My father has to reach the core. That's all that matters now.

seen_not_engaged_response.speaker: LILA
lines: That's honest.
More honest than most people would be at this point.
I'll take it.
My father's going to the mainframe. He's going to try to end this.
Whatever you did out there, what you do in the next hour is what counts.
Don't let him do it alone.

note: — Warden Six. You've seen this model before.
